candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A 0.4 mol sample of an ideal diatomic gas undergoes slow changes from state a to state b to state c and back to a along the cycle shown in the P-V diagram below: Path ab is an isotherm, and it can be shown that the work done by the gas as it changes isothermally from state a to state b is given by the equation $W_{ab} = -nRT \times \ln \left( \frac{V_b}{V_a} \right)$. What is the total work done over cycle $abca$?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 一个理想双原子气体的 0.4 mol 样品经历了从状态 A 到状态 B 到状态 C 的缓慢变化,然后沿 P-V 图中显示的循环返回 A。路径 AB 是一个等温线,从状态 A 到状态 B 气体所做的功可由公式 $w_{ab} = -nRT \ln \left( \frac{V_b}{V_a} \right)$ 给出。在周期 $ABCA$ 上完成的总功是多少?
metadata.explanation_zh:
在循环过程中所做的总功是各步骤所做功的总和:

$W_{\text{cycle}} = W_{ab} + W_{bc} + W_{ca}$

由于该过程是循环的,在ca步骤中所做的功为零,因为系统回到了初始状态。因此,我们有:

$W_{\text{cycle}} = W_{ab} + W_{bc}$
$W_{\text{cycle}} = (-4,000\, \text{J}) + (2,200\, \text{J})$
$W_{\text{cycle}} = -1,800\, \text{J}$

$W_{\text{cycle}}$的负值表示在循环过程中系统对外界做了净功。
